meaning: adj.贵族的,有贵族特点的adv.贵族般地,有气派地
examples: He's got a fine lordly way with him, hasn't he?
I want you to know that lordly AIRS have come to an end so far as I am concerned.
The patterns of the garden keep the Ming dynasty styles of simple and lordly in general.
And being part of the genetically interwoven lordly fabric of Britain is not what it was.
Heating, ventilation and a very robust multi-mode massage function complement this lordly perch.
